AE001.basis: Missing mandatory raw field blocks trustworthy downstream review and mapping.

AE002.description: Required AE field missing on AE-present row
AE002.basis: Key AE capture fields should not be assumed when an event is present.

AE003.basis: Study-level identifier conflict is not safe to standardize automatically.

AE004.basis: Subject/site linkage conflict requires source review.

AE005.basis: Invalid AE presence flag requires source correction.

AE006.description: AEYN_RAW indicates no AE but AE data are populated
AE006.basis: Contradiction between AE flag and populated AE fields requires human resolution.

AE007.basis: Missing verbatim AE term blocks clinically sound coding and review.

AE008.description: Text value has leading or trailing whitespace
AE008.basis: Whitespace issue can be normalized deterministically while preserving raw value in audit output.

AE009.basis: Invalid severity is not a safe normalization target without source confirmation.

AE010.description: AE_TOXGR_RAW valid concept but non-standard format
AE010.basis: Toxicity grade text can be normalized deterministically.

AE011.basis: Unrecognized toxicity grade cannot be safely standardized.

AE012.basis: Clinical inconsistency should be reviewed by data management or safety.

AE013.description: Seriousness criterion present while AE_SER_RAW is not YES
AE013.basis: Overall seriousness contradicts seriousness detail flags.

AE014.description: AE_SER_RAW is YES but no seriousness criterion is present
AE014.basis: Serious AE requires at least one seriousness criterion.

AE015.basis: Overall seriousness flag is required for AE assessment.

AE016.description: Date field valid but non-ISO format
AE016.basis: Date format can be standardized deterministically.

AE017.basis: Invalid or impossible date cannot be safely standardized.

AE018.description: Time field valid but non-standard format
AE018.basis: Time format can be standardized deterministically.

AE019.basis: Invalid time cannot be safely standardized.

AE020.basis: Partial date is clinically meaningful and should be preserved but highlighted for review.

AE021.description: AE start date occurs after AE end date
AE021.basis: Event chronology is impossible and requires source correction.

AE022.description: AE start datetime occurs after AE end datetime on same day
AE022.basis: Time chronology is impossible and requires source correction.

AE023.description: AE report date occurs before AE start date
AE023.basis: Reporting chronology conflict requires source review.

AE024.description: AE start date occurs after visit date
AE024.basis: Timing may indicate visit/date entry issue and should be reviewed.

AE025.basis: Ongoing status is required for correct AE end-date interpretation.

AE026.basis: Ongoing event should not carry an end date unless source is corrected.

AE027.basis: Closed event without end date needs source review.

AE028.description: AE_END_TIME_RAW populated while AE_END_DATE_RAW is missing
AE028.basis: End time without end date cannot be interpreted reliably.

AE029.basis: Outcome conflicts with ongoing status and requires human review.

AE030.description: FATAL outcome without death seriousness criterion
AE030.basis: Fatal AE should be aligned with death seriousness capture.

AE031.basis: Missing relationship to study drug blocks complete AE assessment.

AE032.basis: Relationship text can be standardized deterministically.

AE033.basis: Unrecognized relationship term requires source clarification.

AE034.basis: Duplicate-looking AE records require human decision on whether records represent same event.

AE035.basis: AESEQ candidate should uniquely identify events within subject.

AE036.basis: Missing treatment/randomization identifier weakens traceability and treatment relationship review.

AE037.description: Controlled terminology value differs only by case
AE037.basis: Case-only variation can be standardized deterministically.

AE038.basis: Value is outside approved sponsor/domain terminology and requires source review.

AE039.basis: Updated entry or change reason suggests reviewable workflow activity.
